appliesTo: all earning, monetisation, campaign, membership, attribution, commerce and workspace revenue states
coreRule: no earning opportunity may be published without an identified funder, reserved or settled funding basis, verified release outcome and disclosed dispute rule

moneyFormulas.moolSocialContribution: platform_fee + commercial_margin + subscription_allocation - incentives - payment_cost - fulfilment_cost - support_cost - refunds - fraud_reserve

earningDisclosure: platform fee, tax and other deductions
estimated or exact net user earning
rework rejection dispute and reversal rule
daily monthly campaign and geography cap

funded_campaign.funder: MoolSocial or a verified business workspace with reserved campaign budget
funded_campaign.verifiedOutcome: accepted deliverable and any explicitly funded measurable outcome
funded_campaign.grossBasis: fixed deliverable fee plus separately disclosed outcome bonus
funded_campaign.release: after acceptance and the disclosed review window; target payout T+2 business days
funded_campaign.capacity: reserved outputs, creators, geography, campaign budget and expiry
funded_campaign.dispute: rework, rejection and appeal are bounded by the accepted brief and immutable evidence

attributed_commerce.funder: qualifying commerce margin or a verified seller campaign budget
attributed_commerce.verifiedOutcome: attributed order delivered and retained beyond the applicable cancellation or return window
attributed_commerce.grossBasis: versioned fixed bounty or eligible transaction share
attributed_commerce.release: next settlement after fulfilment and the applicable return or refund window
attributed_commerce.capacity: campaign budget, eligible products, audience, geography and attribution window
attributed_commerce.dispute: attribution uses stored policy version and qualifying events; adjustments use compensating entries

membership.funder: successfully settled monthly or annual member payments
membership.verifiedOutcome: active paid membership after the applicable refund or cooling window
membership.grossBasis: creator share of settled membership receipts
membership.release: rolling settlement, target T+7 after qualifying payment
membership.capacity: active paid members and creator plan eligibility
membership.dispute: member refund or chargeback creates a compensating ledger entry

content_performance_pool.verifiedOutcome: eligible original content performance after invalid-traffic and policy review
content_performance_pool.grossBasis: creator share from a published pool and versioned allocation formula
content_performance_pool.release: monthly close, target payout by the 15th of the following month
content_performance_pool.capacity: declared pool value, eligible content and measurement period
content_performance_pool.dispute: creator can inspect qualifying metrics, adjustment reason and appeal window

local_content_production.funder: verified local business or MoolSocial with a reserved production brief
local_content_production.verifiedOutcome: specified content asset accepted within the disclosed revision limit
local_content_production.grossBasis: fixed production fee plus separately funded usage or performance addition
local_content_production.release: after acceptance and review window, target T+2 business days
local_content_production.capacity: brief budget, asset count, geography and delivery deadline
local_content_production.dispute: acceptance is evaluated only against the frozen brief and submitted evidence

verified_onboarding.funder: MoolSocial or verified workspace activation campaign budget
verified_onboarding.verifiedOutcome: profile-specific workspace verification plus the disclosed qualifying retained action
verified_onboarding.grossBasis: fixed verified activation amount and any separately funded retained-action bonus
verified_onboarding.release: after verification, qualifying action and the disclosed anti-fraud window; target T+7
verified_onboarding.capacity: funded activations by profile, geography and period
verified_onboarding.dispute: identity, duplicate, evidence and qualifying-action reason are reviewable without exposing protected documents

live_campaign_or_event.funder: verified organizer, business workspace or MoolSocial reserved event budget
live_campaign_or_event.verifiedOutcome: accepted event output, attendance or declared action with valid evidence
live_campaign_or_event.grossBasis: fixed event fee plus explicitly funded qualifying-outcome bonus
live_campaign_or_event.release: after event reconciliation and review window, target T+2 business days
live_campaign_or_event.capacity: event slots, location, budget and closing time
live_campaign_or_event.dispute: event evidence and outcome rules are frozen before acceptance

licensed_content_reuse.funder: verified licensee with settled or protected licence consideration
licensed_content_reuse.verifiedOutcome: creator accepts exact reuse scope, term, geography and media
licensed_content_reuse.grossBasis: fixed licence amount or versioned usage-linked consideration
licensed_content_reuse.release: after rights acceptance and funding confirmation, target T+2 business days
licensed_content_reuse.capacity: one rights grant per accepted scope and term
licensed_content_reuse.dispute: reuse outside the accepted scope opens a rights case and does not silently expand the licence

freelancer_task.funder: MoolSocial or verified workspace with reserved task budget
freelancer_task.verifiedOutcome: task-specific evidence accepted against frozen outcome terms
freelancer_task.grossBasis: fixed task amount plus separately disclosed quality or volume bonus
freelancer_task.release: after outcome approval and the disclosed dispute window; target T+2 business days
freelancer_task.capacity: funded task units, worker limit, geography and expiry
freelancer_task.dispute: rework, rejection and appeal retain original proof and reviewer reason

retailer_commerce.funder: settled consumer sale, supplier incentive or declared MoolSocial business-service budget
retailer_commerce.verifiedOutcome: delivered or collected sale, verified procurement saving, completed delivery or accepted growth outcome
retailer_commerce.grossBasis: sale margin, procurement saving or disclosed service incentive
retailer_commerce.release: according to the underlying sale, procurement or service settlement
retailer_commerce.capacity: live stock, service area, funded offer and retailer operating capacity
retailer_commerce.dispute: customer, supplier and service disputes remain linked to their source transaction

manufacturer_supplier_commerce.funder: settled wholesale order, buyer activation budget, exclusive contract or campaign budget
manufacturer_supplier_commerce.verifiedOutcome: goods received, protected payment release, verified buyer activation or contracted outcome
manufacturer_supplier_commerce.grossBasis: wholesale margin, service fee or contracted fixed and performance consideration
manufacturer_supplier_commerce.release: after authoritative goods receipt or contracted outcome acceptance
manufacturer_supplier_commerce.capacity: available finished goods, production capacity, funded territory and contract limit
manufacturer_supplier_commerce.dispute: quantity, quality, invoice and delivery evidence govern release or adjustment

captain_or_transporter.funder: settled customer fare, delivery order, transport order or funded mobility task
captain_or_transporter.verifiedOutcome: completed trip or delivery with payment reconciliation and required proof
captain_or_transporter.grossBasis: fare or job amount plus disclosed incentive
captain_or_transporter.release: daily or weekly configured settlement after completion and payment reconciliation
captain_or_transporter.capacity: verified vehicle, online time, geography, funded incentive and legal operating capacity
captain_or_transporter.dispute: fare, route, proof, cancellation and safety cases retain authoritative trip events

provider_order_or_booking.funder: settled customer order, booking, subscription or funded provider campaign
provider_order_or_booking.verifiedOutcome: fulfilled service, appointment, meal, booking or accepted campaign outcome
provider_order_or_booking.grossBasis: provider price or subscription receipt plus disclosed funded incentive
provider_order_or_booking.release: after completion and applicable cancellation, refund or dispute window
provider_order_or_booking.capacity: verified slots, staff, menu, service area, stock or operating schedule
provider_order_or_booking.dispute: profile-specific proof and cancellation terms govern adjustment

moolSocialRevenue: ride delivery and transport orchestration fee
creator campaign membership and commerce platform fee
exclusive sales sourcing and territory contract
adminControls: gross rate deductions net rate and cap
evidence quality rework and dispute rule
fraud duplicate reversal and clawback rule
productionRules: savings cashback and earnings are separate values
monthly potential uses live funded capacity and user eligibility and is never guaranteed income
install-only and OTP-only incentives are prohibited
no client hard-codes payout fee attribution or settlement terms
no hidden customer surcharge or personal-data sale
